feedback: A-03 (L2 공통 컴포넌트 분석): Spec cites TreeGrid.tsx pattern learning but lacks explicit breakdown of which duplication patterns from the 8 variants (BaseGrid, ChangeTrackingGrid, EditableGrid, etc.) are extracted and reused in MasterDetailGrid. While pattern learning is stated (L130-131), enumerate which specific features/patterns from existing L2 variants map into MasterDetailGrid design to fully satisfy A-03. Example: 'ExpandedState management from MOD-GRID-01, INDENT_PX from TreeGrid, etc.' — current spec shows L0 reference but not L2 variant analysis breakdown.
